input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.8.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.8.1
            TITLE: critical fasteners

            CONTENT:
            rule T.8.1: Critical Fasteners
T.8.1 Critical Fasteners 
A fastener (bolt, screw, pin, etc) used in a location specified in the applicable rule

final_answer: T.8.1 Critical Fasteners A fastener (bolt, screw, pin, etc) used in a location specified in the applicable rule
